sic • parvis • magna
Bristol Workshop

Latent Ability ML

A browsable workshop site for the latent-ability-aware evaluation material, organized by section, activities, and supporting notes.

The workshop is organized as a progression from unsupervised evaluation to binary IRT, and then to Beta4-IRT and CLAIRE. This site was designed to make navigation easier during the session, especially for participants who need a cleaner entry point than the repository root.

Workshop Structure

Section 1

Unsupervised evaluation and the limitation of treating all instances as equally difficult.

Open section Open activity

Section 2

Binary IRT, 1PL intuition, 2PL-IRT, and how to interpret ICCs.

Open section Open activity

Section 3

Beta4-IRT, CLAIRE, agreement-based response matrices, and item-level inspection.

Open section Open activity

Suggested Rhythm

  • 15 minutes of theory per section
  • 15 minutes of guided hands-on explanation per section
  • 30 minutes of participant activity per section

Total estimated duration: 3 hours.

Repository

  • Main repository: latent-ability-ml
  • Roadmap notebook: 00_workshop_roadmap.ipynb
  • Portuguese script: 99_script_portuguese.md
  • English script: 99_script_english.md

README

The repository README is also available through the site navigation, so participants can access the workshop guide without leaving the website.

Open README page
